3059770.name: Leveleers
3059770.description:
LEVELEERS is a co-op adventure game with escape room like puzzles, platformer elements and an isometric perspective that allows for unique puzzles that are not possible with a first person perspective.

  • Non-linear dense hand-crafted ‘escape room’-like puzzles.

  • Relaxing ‘no rush’ attitude.

  • Gorgeous atmospheric isometric world.

  • Classic platforming mechanics (jumping, crouching, running) add agility to the mix.

  • Three playable characters, two androids and their cat, each with their own unique abilities.

  • Discover the characters’ heartbreaking story and help them find peace.

  • Play alone or co-op with your friends (locally or online).

Outside-the-box thinking required ;-)

The game is designed to be played together with friends like escape rooms. To make playing together more fun, each player can control a character to make the experience more interactive.

You can technically play the game alone. There is no simultaneous input from more than one player required to be able to complete the puzzles.
3059770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
